blocks.label: Set Payload
blocks.description: Replace the message body with the result of a CEL expression.

fields.name: value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: CEL expression. Sees body, vars, eventID, correlationID.

blocks.label: Set Variable
blocks.description: Store the result of a CEL expression in a named variable.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Variable name to set.

fields.name: value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated and stored under the variable name.

blocks.label: Delete Variable
blocks.description: Remove a named variable from the message.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Variable name to remove.

blocks.label: Log
blocks.description: Wire-tap that logs the message and passes it through unchanged.

fields.name: message
fields.label: Message
fields.description: CEL expression to log. Defaults to the JSON body.

fields.name: level
fields.label: Level
fields.description: Log level.

fields.name: logger
fields.label: Logger
fields.description: Optional named logger connector to write to.

fields.name: full
fields.label: Full message
fields.description: Attach the whole message (ids, vars, body) as structured log attributes.

blocks.label: REST Call
blocks.description: Make an HTTP request through an http-client connector.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the http-client connector to use.

fields.name: method
fields.label: Method
fields.description: HTTP method.

fields.name: path
fields.label: Path
fields.description: Path appended to the connector base URL.

fields.name: query
fields.label: Query
fields.description: Query params; each value is a CEL expression.

fields.name: headers
fields.label: Headers
fields.description: Request headers; each value is a CEL expression.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: CEL expression for the request body.

fields.name: failOnError
fields.label: Fail on error
fields.description: Turn a 400+ status into a flow error.

fields.name: statusVar
fields.label: Status variable
fields.description: Variable to store the response status code in.

blocks.label: SQL
blocks.description: Execute a SQL statement against a database connector.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the database connector to use.

fields.name: query
fields.label: Query
fields.description: SQL statement with placeholders.

fields.name: args
fields.label: Arguments
fields.description: CEL expressions bound to the statement placeholders.

fields.name: exec
fields.label: Exec mode
fields.description: Use ExecContext (no result set); result becomes {rowsAffected: N}.

fields.name: single
fields.label: Single row
fields.description: In query mode, unwrap the result to the first row object.

blocks.label: Flow Reference
blocks.description: Invoke another flow by name.

fields.name: flow
fields.label: Flow
fields.description: Name of the flow to invoke.

fields.name: oneWay
fields.label: One-way
fields.description: Fire-and-forget if true; otherwise wait and fold the result back in.

blocks.label: Handle Errors
blocks.description: Run the process chain; on error, expose vars.error and run the error chain (recovery).

fields.name: process
fields.label: Process
fields.description: The happy-path chain.

fields.name: error
fields.label: Error
fields.description: Runs when the process chain errors; reads vars.error.

blocks.label: Fork
blocks.description: Scatter the message across parallel branches, then join and pass through.

fields.name: branches
fields.label: Branches
fields.description: Parallel flows; each receives a clone of the message.

blocks.label: If
blocks.description: Conditional branching on a CEL boolean expression.

fields.name: condition
fields.label: Condition
fields.description: CEL boolean expression.

fields.name: then
fields.label: Then
fields.description: Flow run when the condition is true.

fields.name: else
fields.label: Else
fields.description: Flow run when the condition is false.

blocks.label: Switch
blocks.description: Multi-case routing; runs the first matching case or the default.

fields.name: cases
fields.label: Cases
fields.description: Ordered, condition-guarded flows (each has a CEL `when`).

fields.name: default
fields.label: Default
fields.description: Flow run when no case matches.

blocks.label: For Each
blocks.description: Sequentially iterate over an array, running the body per element.

fields.name: items
fields.label: Items
fields.description: CEL expression evaluating to the array to iterate.

fields.name: as
fields.label: As
fields.description: Variable name bound to each element.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Flow run once per element.

blocks.label: Enrich
blocks.description: Run a body flow on an isolated copy of the message, then enrich the message from the result: a CEL expression for the body and a CEL expression per variable.

fields.name: setBody
fields.label: Set body
fields.description: CEL expression for the new body, evaluated against the scope's result (the enriched clone). Empty leaves the body unchanged.

fields.name: setVars
fields.label: Set variables
fields.description: Map of variable name to CEL expression, each evaluated against the scope's result and set on the message.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Flow run once on an isolated clone of the message.

blocks.label: AI Mapping
blocks.description: Reshape the message body to a target shape described by a prompt; validates against an optional output schema and errors on failure.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the LLM connector to use.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: Instruction describing how to reshape the body.

fields.name: inputExample
fields.label: Input example
fields.description: Example input payload that guides recognition (JSON).

fields.name: outputExample
fields.label: Output example
fields.description: Example output payload that shapes the result (JSON).

fields.name: outputSchema
fields.label: Output schema
fields.description: JSON Schema the result is validated against; a failure errors the block.

fields.name: maxTokens
fields.label: Max tokens
fields.description: Response token cap for this call (0 = connector default).

blocks.label: AI Retry
blocks.description: Run the process chain; on error, let the LLM inspect vars.error, revise the message, and retry up to maxAttempts, then run the error chain.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the LLM connector that revises the message between attempts.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: Instruction for repairing the message from vars.error before a retry.

fields.name: maxAttempts
fields.label: Max attempts
fields.description: How many times to revise and re-run the process chain.

fields.name: process
fields.label: Process
fields.description: The protected chain, re-run after each revision.

fields.name: error
fields.label: Error
fields.description: Runs when attempts are exhausted; reads vars.error.

blocks.label: AI Router
blocks.description: Route the message to a named branch the LLM chooses after inspecting it; the default path is the guardrail taken when it is not confident.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the LLM connector that picks the route.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: Routing instruction; the model reads the body/variables before choosing.

fields.name: guardrail
fields.label: Guardrail
fields.description: Describes when to fall back to the default path (low confidence / ambiguity).

fields.name: routes
fields.label: Routes
fields.description: Named, described branches; the model picks one by name.

fields.name: default
fields.label: Default
fields.description: The guardrail path, run when the model is not confident.

blocks.label: AI Agent
blocks.description: Let the LLM call branches as tools in a loop to accomplish a task; tool runs share accumulating variables. The default path is the guardrail.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the LLM connector that drives the agent loop.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.description: Task instruction; the model calls tools as needed, then stops.

fields.name: guardrail
fields.label: Guardrail
fields.description: Describes when to fall back to the default path (cannot complete with confidence).

fields.name: maxIterations
fields.label: Max iterations
fields.description: Cap on tool-calling turns before falling back to the guardrail.

fields.name: memoryThreadId
fields.label: Memory thread ID
fields.description: CEL expression for the conversation thread id. When set, the agent loads the thread's prior transcript before its run and saves it after; empty disables memory.

fields.name: memoryMaxTokens
fields.label: Memory max tokens
fields.description: Estimated-token budget for the stored transcript; it is compacted when it exceeds this.

fields.name: memoryCompaction
fields.label: Memory compaction
fields.description: How to shrink memory over budget: prune drops the oldest turns; summarize folds them into a running summary.

fields.name: tools
fields.label: Tools
fields.description: Named, described branches wired to the model as callable functions.

fields.name: default
fields.label: Default
fields.description: The guardrail path, run when the agent cannot complete the task.

blocks.label: Clear Agent Memory
blocks.description: Erase an ai-agent conversation thread's stored memory by its thread id.

fields.name: threadId
fields.label: Thread ID
fields.description: CEL expression for the thread id whose memory is cleared.

blocks.label: Cache
blocks.description: Memoize the body flow's result in the runtime store, keyed by a CEL expression.

fields.name: key
fields.label: Cache Key
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated to the cache key.

fields.name: ttl
fields.label: TTL
fields.description: How long an entry stays fresh (e.g. '5m'); '0' never expires.

fields.name: body
fields.label: Body
fields.description: Flow whose result is cached and replayed on a hit.

blocks.label: Invalidate Cache
blocks.description: Evict a cache-scope entry by its key so the next run recomputes.

fields.name: key
fields.label: Cache Key
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated to the cache key to evict.

blocks.label: Object Read
blocks.description: Read an object from the runtime store into the body or a variable.

fields.name: key
fields.label: Key
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated to the object key.

fields.name: as
fields.label: As variable
fields.description: Variable to store the object under; empty replaces the body.

blocks.label: Object Write
blocks.description: Write an object to the runtime store under a key.

fields.name: key
fields.label: Key
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated to the object key.

fields.name: value
fields.label: Value
fields.description: CEL expression for the value to store; empty stores the whole body.

blocks.label: Object Delete
blocks.description: Delete an object from the runtime store by key.

fields.name: key
fields.label: Key
fields.description: CEL expression evaluated to the object key.

blocks.label: Queue Dispatch
blocks.description: Send the message to a platform queue subject to load balance work across replicas. By default it publishes fire-and-forget (one-way); enable Await reply to wait for one consumer's reply and fold it back in (request).

fields.name: subject
fields.label: Subject
fields.description: CEL expression for the queue subject to send to; enables per-message routing/sharding.

fields.name: awaitReply
fields.label: Await reply
fields.description: Wait for one consumer's reply and fold its body and variables back in (request). When false (the default) the message is published fire-and-forget (one-way).

fields.name: timeout
fields.label: Timeout
fields.description: How long to wait for a reply when Await reply is set (e.g. 30s); defaults to the queue service timeout.

blocks.label: Slack Send Message
blocks.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or user through a slack connector.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the slack connector to use.

fields.name: target
fields.label: Target
fields.description: CEL expression for the channel ID or user ID (Slack DMs a user).

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description: CEL expression for the message text (required unless blocks is set).

fields.name: threadTs
fields.label: Thread timestamp
fields.description: CEL expression for a parent message ts, to reply in-thread.

fields.name: blocks
fields.label: Blocks
fields.description: CEL expression producing Block Kit blocks (a list).

fields.name: failOnError
fields.label: Fail on error
fields.description: Turn a Slack API error into a flow error.

blocks.label: Slack Verify Request
blocks.description: Verify an inbound Slack request signature and answer the URL-verification challenge.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the slack connector to use.

fields.name: signatureHeader
fields.label: Signature variable
fields.description: Variable holding Slack's request signature.

fields.name: timestampHeader
fields.label: Timestamp variable
fields.description: Variable holding Slack's request timestamp.

fields.name: rawBodyVar
fields.label: Raw body variable
fields.description: Variable holding the exact request body; must match the http source's rawBodyVar.

blocks.label: Slack Event
blocks.description: Normalize a verified Slack event and filter it by type and an optional predicate.

fields.name: eventTypes
fields.label: Event types
fields.description: Allowlist of event types (e.g. app_mention, message); empty allows all.

fields.name: filter
fields.label: Filter
fields.description: CEL predicate over the normalized body; drop the event when false.

blocks.label: Slack Lookup User
blocks.description: Resolve a Slack user by email (users.lookupByEmail) into a variable.

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the slack connector to use.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email
fields.description: CEL expression for the email address to resolve.

fields.name: resultVar
fields.label: Result variable
fields.description: Variable to store the user object in.

fields.name: failOnError
fields.label: Fail on error
fields.description: Turn a Slack API error into a flow error.

blocks.label: Slack Add Reaction
blocks.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message (reactions.add).

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the slack connector to use.

fields.name: channel
fields.label: Channel
fields.description: CEL expression for the message channel ID.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: CEL expression for the target message ts.

fields.name: emoji
fields.label: Emoji
fields.description: CEL expression for the reaction name without colons (e.g. white_check_mark).

fields.name: failOnError
fields.label: Fail on error
fields.description: Turn a Slack API error into a flow error.

blocks.label: Slack Update Message
blocks.description: Edit a message the bot posted earlier (chat.update).

fields.name: connector
fields.label: Connector
fields.description: Name of the slack connector to use.

fields.name: channel
fields.label: Channel
fields.description: CEL expression for the message channel ID.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: CEL expression for the target message ts.

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text
fields.description: CEL expression for the new text (required unless blocks is set).

fields.name: blocks
fields.label: Blocks
fields.description: CEL expression producing replacement Block Kit blocks (a list).

fields.name: failOnError
fields.label: Fail on error
fields.description: Turn a Slack API error into a flow error.

fields.name: subject
fields.label: Subject
fields.description: Queue subject to subscribe to. Every replica subscribed to the same subject competes for messages, so each message is handled once across the cluster.

fields.name: listeners
fields.label: Listeners
fields.description: Number of concurrent handler goroutines; defaults to the queue service default.

fields.name: timeout
fields.label: Timeout
fields.description: How long a handler waits for its flow to finish (e.g. 30s); defaults to the queue service timeout.

fields.name: schedule
fields.label: Schedule
fields.description: Cron expression (6 fields with seconds) or descriptor like @every 2s.

fields.name: payload
fields.label: Payload
fields.description: CEL expression for the message body; sees `now` (fire time).

fields.name: correlationID
fields.label: Correlation ID
fields.description: Static correlation ID for emitted messages.

settings.name: host
settings.label: Host
settings.description: Bind address; empty binds all interfaces.

settings.name: port
settings.label: Port
settings.description: Bind port; 0 = OS-assigned.

settings.name: basePath
settings.label: Base path
settings.description: Prefix for all routes.

settings.name: keepAlive
settings.label: Keep-alive
settings.description: Enable HTTP keep-alives.

settings.name: requestTimeout
settings.label: Request timeout
settings.description: How long a handler waits for the flow to finish.

settings.name: readTimeout
settings.label: Read timeout
settings.description: Server read timeout.

settings.name: writeTimeout
settings.label: Write timeout
settings.description: Server write timeout.

settings.name: idleTimeout
settings.label: Idle timeout
settings.description: Server idle timeout.

fields.name: path
fields.label: Path
fields.description: Route pattern; {name} params become vars.name.

fields.name: headers
fields.label: Headers
fields.description: Request header names to copy into variables.

fields.name: correlationIdHeader
fields.label: Correlation ID header
fields.description: Header to source the CorrelationID from.

fields.name: rawBodyVar
fields.label: Raw body variable
fields.description: Capture the exact request bytes into vars.<name> (e.g. to verify an HMAC signature over the raw body).

fields.name: timeout
fields.label: Timeout
fields.description: Per-route wait for the flow; defaults to the connector request timeout.

fields.name: maxBodyBytes
fields.label: Max body bytes
fields.description: Request body size cap.

settings.name: baseURL
settings.label: Base URL
settings.description: Prepended to each request path.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Timeout
settings.description: Bounds each request.

settings.name: headers
settings.label: Headers
settings.description: Applied to every request unless already set.

settings.name: maxResponseBytes
settings.label: Max response bytes
settings.description: Response body size cap.

settings.name: auth
settings.label: Authentication
settings.description: Authentication applied to every request.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Type
fields.description: Authentication scheme.

fields.name: token
fields.label: Bearer token
fields.description: Token sent as 'Authorization: Bearer'.

fields.name: username
fields.label: Username
fields.description: Basic auth username.

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.description: Basic auth password.

fields.name: tokenURL
fields.label: Token URL
fields.description: OAuth2 token endpoint (client-credentials grant).

fields.name: clientID
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: OAuth2 client identifier.

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.label: Client secret
fields.description: OAuth2 client secret.

fields.name: scopes
fields.label: Scopes
fields.description: Requested OAuth2 scopes.

settings.name: driver
settings.label: Driver
settings.description: Database driver.

settings.name: dsn
settings.label: DSN
settings.description: Data source name (Postgres connection string or SQLite file path).

settings.name: maxOpenConns
settings.label: Max open connections
settings.description: Open connection pool cap (0 = unlimited).

settings.name: maxIdleConns
settings.label: Max idle connections
settings.description: Idle connections kept in the pool.

settings.name: connMaxLifetime
settings.label: Connection max lifetime
settings.description: Duration bounding connection reuse (e.g. 5m).

settings.name: output
settings.label: Output
settings.description: stdout, stderr, or a file path.

settings.name: format
settings.label: Format
settings.description: Log output format.

settings.name: level
settings.label: Level
settings.description: Minimum log level.

settings.name: addSource
settings.label: Add source
settings.description: Include source file:line in log records.

settings.name: apiKey
settings.label: API key
settings.description: Authenticates with the Anthropic API; source from ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}. Never logged.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Model id.

settings.name: maxTokens
settings.label: Max tokens
settings.description: Default response token cap; a request may override it.

settings.name: baseURL
settings.label: Base URL
settings.description: Overrides the API endpoint (for proxies or testing).

settings.name: apiKey
settings.label: API key
settings.description: Authenticates with the OpenAI API; source from ${OPENAI_API_KEY}. Never logged.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Model id.

settings.name: maxTokens
settings.label: Max tokens
settings.description: Default response token cap (0 = the model default); a request may override it.

settings.name: baseURL
settings.label: Base URL
settings.description: Overrides the API endpoint (for proxies, Azure, or OpenAI-compatible servers).

settings.name: apiKey
settings.label: API key
settings.description: Authenticates with the Gemini API; source from ${GEMINI_API_KEY}. Never logged.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Model id.

settings.name: maxTokens
settings.label: Max tokens
settings.description: Default response token cap (0 = the model default); a request may override it.

settings.name: baseURL
settings.label: Base URL
settings.description: Overrides the API endpoint (for proxies or testing).

settings.name: botToken
settings.label: Bot token
settings.description: Bot User OAuth token (xoxb-...) used to call the Web API.

settings.name: signingSecret
settings.label: Signing secret
settings.description: Verifies inbound Slack request signatures; required to receive events.

settings.name: timeout
settings.label: Timeout
settings.description: Bounds each Slack Web API call.
